# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  - name: vpc-network
    type: google_compute_network
    properties:
      name: {{ env "VPC_NETWORK_NAME" }}
      autoCreateSubnetworks: true

  - name: subnet-private
    type: google_compute_subnetwork
    properties:
      name: {{ env "SUBNET_PRIVATE_NAME" }}
      ipCidrRange: {{ env "SUBNET_PRIVATE_RANGE" }}
      network: {{ resources.vpc-network.selfLink }}

  - name: subnet-app
    type: google_compute_subnetwork
    properties:
      name: {{ env "SUBNET_APP_NAME" }}
      ipCidrRange: {{ env "SUBNET_APP_RANGE" }}
      network: {{ resources.vpc-network.selfLink }}

  - name: subnet-db
    type: google_compute_subnetwork
    properties:
      name: {{ env "SUBNET_DB_NAME" }}
      ipCidrRange: {{ env "SUBNET_DB_RANGE" }}
      network: {{ resources.vpc-network.selfLink }}
